name: v3-callback-memory-seed
description: v1.7 Smart Director v3: Director's live-callback ring buffer is pre-seeded. The v3 router picked soundfx and flagged a callback. The fixture asserts the Director honored the LLM pick + the reason line contains the LLM rationale. Keeps the callback-memory plumbing end-to-end verifiable even in the synthetic (no-HTTP) harness.

input.transcript: Anyway, right back to the quantum computing debate. I think IBM's approach is going to win.

llmPickV2.rationale: Topic shift back to quantum; soundfx can echo 'another rocketship pitch' as a deadpan reframe
